title: The Spira Regatta

"'''The Spira Regatta'''" is an adventure for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' written by [[Paul Sudlow]] with illustrations by [[Doug Shuler]]. It was originally published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1|''Star Wars Adventure Journal 1'']] in [[February]] [[1994]] and later reprinted in ''[[The Best of the Star Wars Adventure Journal, Issues 1-4]]'', both by [[West End Games]].

==Plot summary==
[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] activity has significantly increased in the [[Lytton sector/Legends|Lytton sector]], and supplies have become scarce. A group of operatives from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] arrives to recover a shipment of medical and military supplies that has been dumped into the deep sea of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Spira/Legends|Spira]], near the [[The wreck|wreckage of an ancient alien ship]].

Posing as wealthy tourists, the Rebel agents meet their contact, [[Seth Cambriel]]. He informs them that the drop site is temporarily inaccessible due to the path of the annual [[Yacht (aquatic)/Legends|yacht]] race, the [[Spira Regatta Open]]. The agents' plan is to join the race, gain access to the drop zone, and smuggle the supplies into the storage tank of a [[Camray eel]], a highly coveted but smelly trophy for upper class game hunters, all while avoiding the notice of noble [[Regenald Hanniper Snopps III|Regenald Snopps]] and his Imperial escort.
